parsed_review.summary: CP00-779 (RP25 Migration Platform failure-recovery primary; Risk B; 40 units; RP25.P07.M02.S03-RP25.P07.M03.S20) passes hardened read-only review with no findings. Verified via Read/Grep/Glob only. (1) Binding (registry.js:400) matches baseline exactly (pack_id, risk_class B, unit_count 40, range, upstream CP00-778, next CP00-780/RP25.P07.M03.S21, flag migration_platform_failure_recovery_primary_descriptor_verified). (2) Requirements deliverable_counts (failure_recovery 22, security_audit 4, implementation 3, hermes_evidence 4, fixture 2, test 4, claude_review 1 = 40) and micro-title counts (20/20) match the prompt; row math reconciles (M02 = FAILURE_ROWS.slice(2)=18 + FAILURE_CLOSEOUT_ROWS=2 = 20; M03 = FAILURE_ROWS = 20) and hand-counted deliverable_type assignments equal the baseline included_units. (3) Descriptor/coverage validators (validators.js:2072,2100) enforce no-write, no source-system/import runtime, no permission/cross-tenant/audit-body/UI-render leak, no sensitive payloads, claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human approval required; grep found no runtime_opened/writes_product_state/real_client_data true and no secrets/TODOs. (4) Required public exports present via wildcard re-export (index.js); CP779 tests assert runtime-closed descriptor and packets. command-evidence.json records every gate command exit 0 with substantive stdout (migration suite 73/73, full suite 3021/3021, RP25 contract validation passed) -- these exit codes are agent-reported and not re-run by me, but I independently confirmed source/contract/test/manifest internal consistency. (5) No production_ready overclaim: manifest, construction-inspection, and command-evidence all show production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, pending exactly-one valid Claude review; contract regenerated deterministically with validation.valid=true and zero valid:false. (6) Authority boundary intact: Claude is read-only independent reviewer (not final approver), Hermes used only for deterministic descriptor-only packet/receipt handling (emits_runtime_receipt=false), not product runtime; auth preflight passed and no invalid review evidence is counted as valid. blocks_goal_closeout=false because the pack claims only descriptor verification, not runtime or enterprise trust, and the human/enterprise-trust authority boundary is outside this receipt.
